status.title: Network status
status.subtitle: Live status of the AirVPN network, refreshed automatically.
status.error: Unable to reach the AirVPN status service. Please try again shortly.

footer.tagline: Not affiliated with AirVPN. Built on the public AirVPN API.

auth.signupSubtitle: Track your AirVPN account from a single dashboard.
auth.checkEmailBody: If this address can be registered, we sent a link to verify your email. The link expires in 24 hours.

errors.invalid_password: Password must be at least 10 characters.
errors.invalid_request: Please check the form and try again.
errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
errors.email_not_verified: Please verify your email address first. Check your inbox for the link.
errors.invalid_token: This link is invalid or has expired.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

auth.verifySuccessBody: Your email address is confirmed. You can now log in.
auth.verifyErrorBody: This verification link is invalid or has expired. You can request a new one from the login page.
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email address and we will send you a reset link.
auth.forgotCheckEmail: If an account exists for this address, a reset link is on its way. It expires in 1 hour.
auth.resetSuccessBody: Your password has been changed. All existing sessions were signed out. You can now log in.
auth.twoFactorSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
auth.passkeyError: Passkey authentication failed. Please try again or use another method.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your AirVPN account at a glance.
dashboard.noKeyBody: Add your AirVPN API key in the settings to see your account status, active sessions and more. You can generate a key from the AirVPN website under Client Area, API.
dashboard.invalidKey: AirVPN rejected your API key. Please update it in the settings.
dashboard.unavailable: AirVPN is unreachable at the moment. Please try again shortly.
dashboard.disconnectConfirm: This will disconnect your VPN session. Continue?
dashboard.deviceAdded: Device created as "New device" — the AirVPN API ignores names, rename it on airvpn.org (Client Area, Devices).
dashboard.deviceError: Could not create the device. Try again shortly.
dashboard.deleteDeviceConfirm: Delete the device "{name}"? AirVPN revokes its keys — every profile generated for it stops working. This cannot be undone.
dashboard.historyNote: History is recorded locally while the dashboard is open — AirVPN keeps no connection history itself.

vpnProfiles.title: VPN Profiles
vpnProfiles.subtitle: Generate OpenVPN or WireGuard configuration files for your devices.
vpnProfiles.deviceHint: Each device has its own keys on your AirVPN account. The profile is generated for the selected device.
vpnProfiles.downloaded: {filename} downloaded. The file contains this device's private keys — store it securely.
vpnProfiles.qrHint: Scan with the WireGuard mobile app to import this profile directly. The QR contains the private keys — do not share it or leave it on screen.
vpnProfiles.openInAppHint: Pick WireGuard (or OpenVPN) in the share sheet to import the profile directly.

errors.no_api_key: Add your AirVPN API key in the settings first.
errors.invalid_api_key: AirVPN rejected your API key. Please update it in the settings.
errors.generator_error: AirVPN's generator reported an error for this selection. Try another server or port.
errors.airvpn_unavailable: AirVPN is unreachable at the moment. Please try again shortly.
errors.invalid_request: Please check the form and try again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

stats.title: Statistics
stats.subtitle: Built from your local connection history — recorded while the dashboard is open.
stats.empty: No history yet. Keep the dashboard open while connected and statistics will build up here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account, security and AirVPN connection.

apiKey.title: AirVPN API key
apiKey.bodyNoKey: Paste your AirVPN API key to connect your account. Generate one on the AirVPN website under Client Area, API.
apiKey.bodyHasKey: An API key is configured. It is stored encrypted and never displayed again.
apiKey.removeConfirm: Remove your AirVPN API key? The dashboard will no longer show your account data.

errors.invalid_api_key: AirVPN rejected this key. Double-check it and try again.
errors.airvpn_unavailable: Could not reach AirVPN to verify the key. Try again shortly.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

account.title: Account
account.emailPending: Pending confirmation: {email} — check that inbox to complete the change.
account.emailCheckInbox: If this address is available, a confirmation link has been sent to it. Your current email stays active until then.
account.passwordBody: Changing your password signs out every other session.
account.passwordChanged: Password updated. Other sessions were signed out.
account.dangerBody: Deleting your account permanently removes your AirVPN key, passkeys, history and settings. This cannot be undone.
account.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete your account and all its data? This cannot be undone.

sessions.title: Login sessions
sessions.body: Devices currently signed in to this dashboard.

security.title: Security
security.twoFactorOff: Protect your account with a 6-digit code from an authenticator app.
security.scanQr: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code to confirm.
security.backupCodesBody: Store these codes somewhere safe. Each can be used once if you lose access to your authenticator app. They will not be shown again.
security.passkeysBody: Sign in with Touch ID, Face ID or a security key. Passkeys are phishing-resistant and tied to this site.
